module.title: SAP TM Reporting, Analytics & Performance Management

learningObjectives.title: Understand Fiori analytical dashboards
learningObjectives.description: Explain interactive KPI and operational analytics presentation in SAP Fiori apps.

learningObjectives.title: Understand dashboard capabilities
learningObjectives.description: Describe role-based tiles, drill-down analysis, filtering, and responsive UI behavior.

learningObjectives.title: Understand business impact
learningObjectives.description: Clarify faster decision-making through real-time visual transportation insights.

sections.content: SAP Fiori provides role-based analytical dashboards for SAP Transportation Management. These dashboards present transportation KPIs, Freight Orders, execution status, carrier performance and settlement information using interactive charts, tables and drill-down capabilities. Users can analyze business data in real time without running traditional reports.

sections.title: Key Concept
sections.content: SAP Fiori dashboards transform operational transportation data into interactive visual insights for faster business decisions.

A transportation manager opens the SAP Fiori dashboard each morning to review delayed shipments, carrier performance and transportation costs. After identifying a sudden increase in shipment delays for one region, the manager drills down into the data and reallocates shipments to alternative carriers.

sections.title: Traditional Reports vs SAP Fiori Dashboards
Best Practice
sections.content: Customize Fiori dashboards for different business roles so users see only the KPIs and analytics relevant to their responsibilities.

sections.title: Real Project Example
sections.content: A global logistics company implemented role-based SAP Fiori dashboards for planners, dispatchers and executives. Decision-making became faster because each user accessed real-time transportation analytics tailored to their role.

sections.title: Interview Tip
sections.content: SAP Fiori analytical apps emphasize real-time KPIs, drill-down analysis and role-based dashboards. These are common certification topics.

sections.title: Common Mistake
sections.content: Dashboards visualize business data but do not replace transportation planning or execution. They support monitoring and decision-making.

items: SAP Fiori provides interactive transportation dashboards.
Dashboards display KPIs, shipment status and settlement information.
Real-time dashboards support faster transportation decisions.
